title: latest packages copr repo
body:
https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/baude/Upstream_CRIO_Family/builds/ is mentioned as a source for latest packages on https://podman.io/getting-started/installation.

There aren't many recent builds, so maybe part of the CI/CD is broken?

cc @baude

comments.body: not sure whats going on there ... everything looks ok, i edited the settings and re-saved to see if the autobuilds start working again.
